title: Ship In A Bottle Fix
description: Rebalances Ship In A Bottle's XP Cost
body:
## Overview
Allows you to change the experience cost of bottling ships with the mod [Ship In A Bottle](https://modrinth.com/mod/vs-ship-in-a-bottle).

## Notes
Default is 30 levels (extremely overpriced in my opinion, unless you have some insane mob farm)

Doesn't Have any failsafes for weird values so

You can access the configs from Mod Menu (hence owo-lib) or from a file
